title: PAI: The Life OS for AI-Powered Development
summary: PAI, or Personal AI Infrastructure, is a Life OS built on Claude Code that provides AI agents with persistent memory of project context, custom skills, structured workflows, and a seven-phase algorithm for development tasks. It addresses the problem of AI agents forgetting project architecture, coding standards, and past decisions between sessions.
writeup: The video covers PAI (Personal AI Infrastructure), a Life OS built on Claude Code that gives AI agents persistent memory of project context across sessions, custom skills, structured workflows, and a seven-phase algorithm for development tasks. It targets a familiar failure mode: agents forgetting project architecture, coding standards, and past decisions once a session ends. The takeaway is an architecture that combines persistent memory with defined skills and workflows so agents retain continuity rather than restarting cold.
